initial_request_score.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: Computational methods of predicting protein stability changes upon missense mutations
incorporates information from molecular dynamics, biochemical properties, as well as FoldX energy terms
develop a statistical framework that quantifies the uncertainty of predicted changes in protein stability
upper bounds on the uncertainty of folding stability predictions of ±2.9 kcal/mol and ±3.5 kcal/mol for binding stability predictions

issues.claim: upper bounds on uncertainty of ±2.9 kcal/mol... as quantifiable_goal
issues.reason: The text presents these values as Results/Findings ('we can generally expect'), not as pre-set Initial Goals. Framing findings as goals is a semantic mismatch, though values are factually correct.

initial_request_score.fix_suggestion: Change 'quantifiable_goal' to 'quantifiable_results' or rephrase user_intent to reflect the goal was to 'determine' these bounds rather than achieve pre-set values.

evidence.quote: datasets containing 1187 mutations (672 for folding stability and 515 for binding stability)
ProTherm database [18]... Skempi database [19]
editing out unnecessary chains, fixing the missing residues, and standardizing the nomenclature
100 ns-long MD simulations with the GROMACS 5.0.3 MD package
Miller et al. [20]
100 snapshots, each 1 ns apart, were captured from each MD simulation
analyzed using FoldX 4.0... ΔΔG values per mutation from each of the 100 snapshots were then averaged
FoldX program... [2, 4, 5]

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: built a set of analogous but separate datasets with ΔΔG values calculated from using a single experimental structure file

issues.reason: The step was executed successfully as a control (Models 1-2), though not selected for final model. 'valid: false' might be misleading regarding execution status.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Clarify that 'valid: false' means 'not selected for final model' rather than 'execution failed'.

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: Two methods were used in the model selection: the stepwise selection method and the best subset selection method

issues.reason: Stepwise selection was performed but outperformed by best subset. 'valid: false' is consistent with 'not selected' but ambiguous on execution.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Clarify that 'valid: false' indicates inferior performance, not failure to execute.

evidence.quote: best subset selection compares models with every possible combination... Bayesian information criterion (BIC) was our selection criterion
modified the method by excluding all datapoints from one system as a testing set— i.e., we leave one system out
predictors of the final models are van der Waals energy, van der Waals clash, side chain entropy, SD of total energy, involvement of proline, and secondary structure
upper bounds on the uncertainty of folding stability predictions of ±2.9 kcal/mol and ±3.5 kcal/mol for binding stability predictions
modified leave-one-out cross validation... leave one system out
±2.9 kcal/mol... ±3.5 kcal/mol... 95% prediction interval
model precision improves significantly when we utilize molecular dynamics simulation
